name: field-force-manager
description: iCrewForce Field Force Manager — Next.js 16 (App Router) + NestJS + Prisma. Apps install dependencies independently inside apps/api and apps/web.

scripts.install:all: yarn --cwd apps/api install && yarn --cwd apps/web install
scripts.lint: yarn --cwd apps/api lint && yarn --cwd apps/web lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn --cwd apps/api typecheck && yarn --cwd apps/web typecheck
